mapper.sql: g.er_id, g.gap_sn, g.gap_dt, g.ref_info, g.gap_cause_cd, g.gap_type_cd, g.repl_mthd_desc, g.afct_co2_emsn, g.thrshld_5pct_xc_yn, g.use_bgng_dt, g.use_end_dt, g.frst_reg_dt, g.frst_reg_user_id, g.last_chg_dt, g.last_chg_user_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM er.tn_er_data_gap g WHERE g.er_id = #{erId} AND NOW() BETWEEN g.use_bgng_dt AND g.use_end_dt ORDER BY g.gap_sn ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO er.tn_er_data_gap (er_id, gap_sn, gap_dt, ref_info, gap_cause_cd, gap_type_cd, repl_mthd_desc, afct_co2_emsn, thrshld_5pct_xc_yn, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{erId}, #{gapSn}, #{gapDt}, #{refInfo}, #{gapCauseCd}, #{gapTypeCd}, #{replMthdDesc}, #{afctCo2Emsn}, #{thrshld5pctXcYn}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE er.tn_er_data_gap SET gap_dt = #{gapDt}, ref_info = #{refInfo}, gap_cause_cd = #{gapCauseCd}, gap_type_cd = #{gapTypeCd}, repl_mthd_desc = #{replMthdDesc}, afct_co2_emsn = #{afctCo2Emsn}, thrshld_5pct_xc_yn = #{thrshld5pctXcYn}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE er_id = #{erId} AND gap_sn = #{gapSn} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO er.tn_er_data_gap (er_id, gap_sn, gap_dt, ref_info, gap_cause_cd, gap_type_cd, repl_mthd_desc, afct_co2_emsn, thrshld_5pct_xc_yn, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) SELECT #{dstErId}, gap_sn, gap_dt, ref_info, gap_cause_cd, gap_type_cd, repl_mthd_desc, afct_co2_emsn, thrshld_5pct_xc_yn, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId} FROM er.tn_er_data_gap WHERE er_id = #{srcErId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
